results.predicted_sparql:
PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX elita: <http://w3id.org/elita/>
PREFIX lila: <http://lila-erc.eu/ontologies/lila/>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX vartrans: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/vartrans#>

SELECT ?liitaLemma ?itLemmaString ?parLemma ?parWR ?emotionLabel 
WHERE {
 ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
 ?liitaLemma ontolex:writtenRep ?itLemmaString .
 FILTER(str(?itLemmaString) = "tristezza") .
 ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
 ?elitaLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
 ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .
 ?emotion rdfs:label ?emotionLabel .
 VALUES ?emotion { elita:Tristezza elita:Tristezza }
 ?itToParEntry ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma ;
 vartrans:translatableAs ?parEntry .
 ?parEntry ontolex:canonicalForm ?parLemma .
 ?parLemma dcterms:isPartOf <http://liita.it/data/id/DialettoParmigiano/lemma/LemmaBank> ;
 ontolex:writtenRep ?parWR .
}

ORDER BY ?itLemmaString

PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>

PREFIX lila: <http://lila-erc.eu/ontologies/lila/>

PREFIX vartrans: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/vartrans#>

SELECT ?liitaLemma ?itLemmaString ?sicLemma ?sicWR ?emotionLabel 
WHERE {
 ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
 ?liitaLemma ontolex:writtenRep ?itLemmaString .
 FILTER(str(?itLemmaString) = "rabbia") .
 ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
 ?elitaLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
 ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .
 ?emotion rdfs:label ?emotionLabel .
 VALUES ?emotion { elita:Rabbia elita:Rabbia }
 ?itToSicEntry ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma ;
 vartrans:translatableAs ?sicEntry .
 ?sicEntry ontolex:canonicalForm ?sicLemma .
 ?sicLemma dcterms:isPartOf <http://liita.it/data/id/DialettoSiciliano/lemma/LemmaBank> ;
 ontolex:writtenRep ?sicWR .
}

ORDER BY ?itLemmaString

 ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .
 ?emotion rdfs:label ?emotionLabel .
 VALUES ?emotion { elita:Paura elita:Aspettativa }
 ?itToParEntry ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma ;

PREFIX elita: <http://w3id.org/elita/>
PREFIX lila: <http://lila-erc.eu/ontologies/lila/>
PREFIX marl: <http://www.gsi.upm.es/ontologies/marl/ns#>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?liitaLemma ?emotionLabel ?polarityLabel ?polarityValue
WHERE {
 ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
 ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
 ?elitaLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
 ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .
 ?emotion rdfs:label ?emotionLabel .
 
 ?sentixLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
 OPTIONAL { ?sentixLemma marl:hasPolarityValue ?polarityValue . }
 OPTIONAL {
 ?sentixLemma marl:hasPolarity ?polarity .
 ?polarity rdfs:label ?polarityLabel .
 }
}

PREFIX elita: <http://w3id.org/elita/>
PREFIX lila: <http://lila-erc.eu/ontologies/lila/>
PREFIX marl: <http://www.gsi.upm.es/ontologies/marl/ns#>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>

WHERE {

 ?elitaLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
 ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .

 ?sentixLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .

 OPTIONAL {

 ?polarity rdfs:label ?polarityLabel .

PREFIX elita: <http://w3id.org/elita/>
PREFIX lila: <http://lila-erc.eu/ontologies/lila/>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?liitaLemma) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
  ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
  ?elitaLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
  ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .
  ?emotion rdfs:label ?emotionLabel .
  VALUES ?emotion { elita:Gioia }
}

PREFIX elita: <http://w3id.org/elita/>
PREFIX lila: <http://lila-erc.eu/ontologies/lila/>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>

WHERE {

 ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
 ?elitaLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
 ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .
 ?emotion rdfs:label ?emotionLabel .
 
}

PREFIX elita: <http://w3id.org/elita/>
PREFIX lila: <http://lila-erc.eu/ontologies/lila/>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?liitaLemma) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
  ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
  ?elitaLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
  ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .
  ?emotion rdfs:label ?emotionLabel .
  VALUES ?emotion { elita:Rabbia }
}

PREFIX elita: <http://w3id.org/elita/>
PREFIX lila: <http://lila-erc.eu/ontologies/lila/>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?pos (COUNT(DISTINCT ?liitaLemma) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
  ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
  ?elitaLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
  ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .
  ?emotion rdfs:label ?emotionLabel .
  
  GRAPH <http://liita.it/data> {
    ?liitaLemma lila:hasPOS ?pos .
  }
}
GROUP BY ?pos
ORDER BY DESC(?count)

PREFIX lila: <http://lila-erc.eu/ontologies/lila/>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>

SELECT ?liitaLemma ?itLemmaString
WHERE {
  ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
  ?liitaLemma ontolex:writtenRep ?itLemmaString .
  FILTER(str(?itLemmaString) = "sole") .
  ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
}
ORDER BY ?itLemmaString

PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX lila: <http://lila-erc.eu/ontologies/lila/>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>

SELECT ?sicLemma ?sicWR
WHERE {
    ?sicLemma a lila:Lemma .
    ?sicLemma dcterms:isPartOf <http://liita.it/data/id/DialettoSiciliano/lemma/LemmaBank> .
    ?sicLemma lila:hasPOS lila:noun .
    ?sicLemma ontolex:writtenRep ?sicWR .
    FILTER(STRENDS(STR(?sicWR), "zione")) .
}

 FILTER(LCASE(STR(?emotionLabel)) IN ("joy", "happiness"))

 ?emotion rdfs:label ?emotionLabel .
 VALUES ?emotion { elita:Sorpresa }
 ?itToParEntry ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma ;
 vartrans:translatableAs ?parEntry .
 ?parEntry ontolex:canonicalForm ?parLemma .
 ?parLemma dcterms:isPartOf <http://liita.it/data/id/DialettoParmigiano/lemma/LemmaBank> ;
 ontolex:writtenRep ?parWR .
}

PREFIX elita: <http://w3id.org/elita/>
PREFIX lila: <http://lila-erc.eu/ontologies/lila/>
PREFIX marl: <http://www.gsi.upm.es/ontologies/marl/ns#>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT ?liitaLemma ?emotionLabel ?polarityLabel ?polarityValue
WHERE {
 ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
 ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
 ?elitaLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
 ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .
 ?emotion rdfs:label ?emotionLabel .
 
 ?sentixLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
 OPTIONAL { ?sentixLemma marl:hasPolarityValue ?polarityValue . }
 OPTIONAL {
 ?sentixLemma marl:hasPolarity ?polarity .
 ?polarity rdfs:label ?polarityLabel .
 }
}

  ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .
  ?emotion rdfs:label ?emotionLabel .
  
}

PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX elita: <http://w3id.org/elita/>
PREFIX lila: <http://lila-erc.eu/ontologies/lila/>
PREFIX marl: <http://www.gsi.upm.es/ontologies/marl/ns#>
PREFIX ontolex: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/ontolex#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX vartrans: <http://www.w3.org/ns/lemon/vartrans#>

SELECT ?liitaLemma ?itLemmaString ?sicLemma ?sicWR ?emotionLabel ?polarityLabel ?polarityValue 
WHERE {
 ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
 ?liitaLemma ontolex:writtenRep ?itLemmaString .
 FILTER(str(?itLemmaString) = "gioi") .
 ?liitaLemma a lila:Lemma .
 ?elitaLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
 ?elitaLemma elita:HasEmotion ?emotion .
 ?emotion rdfs:label ?emotionLabel .
 FILTER(LCASE(STR(?emotionLabel)) IN ("gioi", "joy"))
 ?sentixLemma ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma .
 OPTIONAL { ?sentixLemma marl:hasPolarityValue ?polarityValue . }
 OPTIONAL {
 ?sentixLemma marl:hasPolarity ?polarity .
 ?polarity rdfs:label ?polarityLabel .
 }
 ?itToSicEntry ontolex:canonicalForm ?liitaLemma ;
 vartrans:translatableAs ?sicEntry .
 ?sicEntry ontolex:canonicalForm ?sicLemma .
 ?sicLemma dcterms:isPartOf <http://liita.it/data/id/DialettoSiciliano/lemma/LemmaBank> ;
 ontolex:writtenRep ?sicWR .
}

ORDER BY ?itLemmaString
